Objects.Name: [Module] Child Switch Area
Objects.Notes: An area that performs checks on the number of objects inside of it and activates a switch.

Classes.Name: ChildSwitchArea
Classes.Notes: An area that activates when the specified amount of child objects connected is in the area.

Obj_arg0.Name: Object Count
Obj_arg0.Description: Specifies the number of objects to check. Default is the number of child objects.

Obj_arg1.Name: Comparator
Obj_arg1.Description: Specifies the method to compare between the number of child objects and Obj_arg0. Default is 0.

Obj_arg2.Name: Deactivate when false?
Obj_arg2.Description: If set, the switch will deactivate again if the comparison is false.

SW_A.Description: Activates when the specified amount of child objects connected is in the area.
